sentences.en: Did you make your bed this morning?
sentences.zh: 你今天早上有整理床鋪嗎？
sentences.ipa: /dɪd juː meɪk jʊər bed ðɪs ˈmɔːrnɪŋ/

sentences.en: Would you like milk or water?
sentences.zh: 你要牛奶還是水？
sentences.ipa: /wʊd juː laɪk mɪlk ɔːr ˈwɔːtər/

sentences.en: Brush your teeth before you go to bed.
sentences.zh: 睡前要刷牙。
sentences.ipa: /brʌʃ jʊər tiːθ bɪˈfɔːr juː ɡoʊ tuː bed/

sentences.en: Hold my hand in the parking lot.
sentences.zh: 在停車場要牽我的手。
sentences.ipa: /hoʊld maɪ hænd ɪn ðə ˈpɑːrkɪŋ lɑːt/

sentences.en: Do you want a push on the swing?
sentences.zh: 要我推你盪鞦韆嗎？
sentences.ipa: /duː juː wɑːnt ə pʊʃ ɑːn ðə swɪŋ/

sentences.en: Who did you sit with at lunch?
sentences.zh: 你午餐跟誰坐在一起？
sentences.ipa: /huː dɪd juː sɪt wɪð æt lʌntʃ/

sentences.en: You need to practice reading every day.
sentences.zh: 你需要每天練習閱讀。
sentences.ipa: /juː niːd tuː ˈpræktɪs ˈriːdɪŋ ˈevri deɪ/

sentences.en: Let's put your toys back in the box.
sentences.zh: 我們把玩具放回箱子裡吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pʊt jʊər tɔɪz bæk ɪn ðə bɑːks/

sentences.en: You can tell me anything that's bothering you.
sentences.zh: 有什麼困擾你的都可以跟我說。
sentences.ipa: /juː kæn tel miː ˈeniθɪŋ ðæts ˈbɑːðərɪŋ juː/

sentences.en: Let's take a break in the quiet corner.
sentences.zh: 我們去安靜角落休息一下吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets teɪk ə breɪk ɪn ðə ˈkwaɪət ˈkɔːrnər/

sentences.en: You should be proud of yourself.
sentences.zh: 你應該為自己感到驕傲。
sentences.ipa: /juː ʃʊd biː praʊd ʌv jɔːrˈself/

sentences.en: Stay where I can see you.
sentences.zh: 待在我看得到的地方。
sentences.ipa: /steɪ wer aɪ kæn siː juː/

sentences.en: This might sting a little, be brave.
sentences.zh: 這可能會有點刺痛，要勇敢喔。
sentences.ipa: /ðɪs maɪt stɪŋ ə ˈlɪtl biː breɪv/

sentences.en: Your cousins are coming over this weekend.
sentences.zh: 你的表兄弟姊妹這週末要來玩。
sentences.ipa: /jʊər ˈkʌzənz ɑːr ˈkʌmɪŋ ˈoʊvər ðɪs ˈwiːkend/

sentences.en: You two seem to get along really well.
sentences.zh: 你們兩個好像相處得很好。
sentences.ipa: /juː tuː siːm tuː ɡet əˈlɔːŋ ˈriːli wel/

sentences.en: Say excuse me when you walk by.
sentences.zh: 經過的時候要說借過。
sentences.ipa: /seɪ ɪkˈskjuːz miː wen juː wɔːk baɪ/

sentences.en: Put on your boots, it's snowing.
sentences.zh: 穿上你的雪靴，正在下雪呢。
sentences.ipa: /pʊt ɑːn jʊər buːts ɪts ˈsnoʊɪŋ/

sentences.en: No phones at the dinner table.
sentences.zh: 餐桌上不能用手機。
sentences.ipa: /noʊ foʊnz æt ðə ˈdɪnər ˈteɪbl/

sentences.en: Let's make a wish before you cut the cake.
sentences.zh: 切蛋糕前先許個願吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets meɪk ə wɪʃ bɪˈfɔːr juː kʌt ðə keɪk/

sentences.en: What do you think happens next in the story?
sentences.zh: 你覺得故事接下來會發生什麼事？
sentences.ipa: /wʌt duː juː θɪŋk ˈhæpənz nekst ɪn ðə ˈstɔːri/
